items.title: [正面] 说实在的，市面上这么多二游很少有人出这种肉鸽主题的卡牌二游，是个人很喜欢的组合，角色立绘也不错，玩法...
items.summary: 说实在的，市面上这么多二游很少有人出这种肉鸽主题的卡牌二游，是个人很喜欢的组合，角色立绘也不错，玩法也算新奇，唯一的缺点是局外成长性过少和局内随机量也少，刻印和遗器的机制虽然撑起了局内但还是不够，如果官方可以看到希望可以加一些类似局内复制一些唤醒体的卡牌，从而更加自由的调整牌库，只能删牌的必要性不是很大，并且希望角色可以有live2D，我很想看到拉蒙娜动起来，作为二游这点很不应该，希望游戏越做越好，早日上线手机端

items.title:
[正面] [u] Comparisons [/u]

Aside from the Slay the Spir...
items.summary:
[u] Comparisons [/u]

Aside from the Slay the Spires and other gameplay comparisons, I'd say the closest comparison story-wise is Limbus Company. Although unlike Limbus Company, the mellow tone and dark themes are more consistent with slower-paced development. 

One more minor comparison would be Honkai Star Rail and other similar games where the main character must investigate incidents that are impacting the contamination/disappearance of people or entire regions.

[u] Gameplay [/u]

In general, the front unit must be attacked instead of having selectable targets, which can greatly influence your tactics. 
There's been a rise of fan games that copy Spires' mechanics where targeting options and cost systems may differ.

Aside from Command Cards, there are up to 4 party abilities that charge when their card is used, plus the player's ability which grows globally. 4 (realm) factions influence the nature of unit's abilities and the ability the player can use.

The gacha system has no bad pulls for units. Any unit you get is typically better than the default 4 units, but pay attention to the roles and dungeon requirements. If you have no healer in a dungeon where you should have a certain health percentage, it'll be difficult to clear extra conditions.

[u] Overall Experience [/u]

In its own way, Morimens handles the story and art well enough to be a solid experience. 

There's obviously translation issues, but only people who have weak reading skills would struggle to understand the story. It's unfair to downvote the game due to minor translation issues. 

The gacha system is fair. You might not get any units within the first 20 or so pulls, but that's ok. There's plenty of methods to get more free gacha chances via missions and other ways. No real money needed, no heavy grinding.

As you unlock more features, you can grow at your own pace more freely through expeditions and instant farming. There's no paywall or impossible challenge spikes that would prevent you from progressing in the main story. 

The extra requirements of each story dungeon serves as a neat tutorial without you actually having to do the requirements. You just get extra currency. It's good to do them if you can.

items.title: [正面] เกมส์ดียยยยย์
items.summary: เกมส์ดียยยยย์
